title: Sprint Planning — Week 25
transcript:
Alice: Let's start the sprint planning. I've got the auth flow mostly done but need to fix the Safari crash first.
Bob: The dashboard designs are ready for review. I need Alice's input on the navigation layout.
Carol: I've noticed the API documentation is missing endpoint specs for the new chat feature. Someone should document those.
Dave: The build server is running low on disk space. I'll clean up old artifacts tonight.
Alice: Also, we should schedule a security review before the next release. I'll set that up.
Bob: Great. Let me know if anyone needs help with testing — I have some bandwidth this week.
